title: pelargonium schraderi
intro: Pelargonium schraderi, commonly known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium schraderi include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and providing relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
